name: Light Dragon @Ignister
name_jp: ライトドラゴン<ruby lang="jp"><rb>＠</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>イグニスター
desc:
2 Level 4 monsters
If a monster(s) you control would be destroyed by card effect, you can detach 1 material from this card instead. You can only use each of the following effects of "Light Dragon @Ignister" once per turn. You can detach 1 material from this card; destroy face-up monsters your opponent controls, up to the number of "@Ignister" monsters you control. When another Cyberse monster you control inflicts battle damage to your opponent: You can Special Summon 1 Link Monster from your GY.

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
mst: Destroys your opponent's face-up Monster Cards
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
